## Non-Negotiables
- No private info (no secrets, no internal IPs, no client names without explicit permission)
- Auto-update via GitHub Actions — never manually edit content that can be automated (commit stats, repo lists, activity feeds)
- Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`)
- No external backlinks that leak value — all links point to DAS domains or high-signal references
